narrative:
Mostafa Shobeir is the goalkeeper for Egypt, holding an overall rating of 7.51/10. This places him in the top 4% of goalkeepers at this tournament. His rating range of 7.11–7.91 indicates a consistent performance level across his appearances.

Shobeir has played 390 minutes at this World Cup, demonstrating his importance to the squad. He averages 2.308 saves per 90 minutes, showcasing his shot-stopping effectiveness. Furthermore, his 2.308 clearances per 90 minutes highlight his active role in commanding his penalty area.

As a key defensive anchor for the Egyptian national team, Shobeir's strong club form accounts for 86% of his overall rating. Scouts and fans should closely watch his ability to maintain his high save rate and his commanding presence in the box throughout the remainder of the tournament.
